reason: Independent reviewer mechanism is required by V0.4 protocol, but no automated independent reviewer daemon is resolvable in the current local environment. Self-approval by Hermes is strictly forbidden.
observation: V0.4 practical validation observation: Batch progression stalls at Phase D (Independent Contract Review) because the loop relies on external independent reviewers. While artifact-driven coordination succeeds, true end-to-end autonomous batching requires either a dual-agent configuration (e.g., Hermes + OpenCode acting as orthogonal verifiers via a designated Reviewer agent script) or explicit human intervention.
required_action: Awaiting human reviewer to independently sign tasks/v0.5-m1-contract-review-decision.json to unblock M1 execution.
